tool.textNote: Text Note — click anywhere on the PDF to type a note
tool.highlight: Freehand Highlight — draw a highlight stroke over text
tool.eraser: Eraser — click or drag to remove annotations

navigation.outlineEmpty: No outline available for this PDF.
navigation.outlineHint: This document does not expose a table of contents.
navigation.bookmarksHint: Use the bookmark button in the toolbar to save the current page.

notFound.title: No matches found
notFound.description: Could not find “{term}” in the current document.

loadError.title: Failed to load library
loadError.description: The library data could not be loaded right now.

openError.title: Failed to open PDF
openError.description: The selected PDF could not be opened.

openNoPdf.title: No PDF attachment
openNoPdf.description: This library item does not have a PDF attachment yet.

success.title: PDF imported
success.multipleDescription: {count} PDFs were added to your library.

error.title: Import failed
error.description: The selected PDF could not be imported.

error.title: Identifier import failed
error.description: The DOI or arXiv identifier could not be imported.

success.title: References imported
success.existingDescription: All {count} references already existed in your library.

error.title: Reference import failed
error.description: The selected BibTeX, RIS, or CSL JSON file could not be imported.

error.title: Batch refresh failed
error.description: Could not refresh metadata for items in this view.

loadError.title: Failed to load tags
loadError.description: Tag information could not be refreshed.

updateError.title: Failed to update tags
updateError.description: Could not update tags for this item.

colorUpdateError.title: Failed to update tag color
colorUpdateError.description: Could not update the color for #{tag}.

deleteError.title: Failed to delete item
deleteError.description: The selected item could not be deleted.

restoreError.title: Failed to restore item
restoreError.description: The selected item could not be restored from the trash.

emptySuccess.title: Trash emptied
emptySuccess.description: All trashed items were permanently removed.

emptyError.title: Failed to empty trash
emptyError.description: The trash could not be emptied.

renameError.title: Failed to rename item
renameError.description: The selected item could not be renamed.

moveError.title: Failed to move item
moveError.description: The selected item could not be moved.

mergeError.title: Failed to merge duplicates
mergeError.description: The selected duplicate group could not be merged.

renameError.title: Failed to rename folder
renameError.description: The selected folder could not be renamed.

deleteError.title: Failed to delete folder
deleteError.description: The selected folder could not be deleted.

saveError.title: Failed to save metadata
saveError.description: Your metadata changes could not be saved.

retrieveSuccess.title: Metadata updated
retrieveSuccess.description: The latest metadata was retrieved for this PDF.

retrieveError.title: Metadata lookup failed
retrieveError.description: No new metadata could be retrieved for this PDF.

noteSaveError.title: Failed to save note
noteSaveError.description: Your note could not be saved.

extractSuccess.title: Annotations extracted
extractSuccess.description: PDF text annotations were added to the note.

extractError.title: Failed to extract annotations
extractError.description: PDF annotations could not be appended to the note.

annotationsExportError.title: Failed to export annotations
annotationsExportError.description: Could not generate the annotations Markdown export.

annotationsEmpty.title: No annotations to export
annotationsEmpty.description: This paper does not have any saved annotations yet.

annotationUpdateError.title: Failed to update annotation
annotationUpdateError.description: The text annotation could not be saved.

annotationDeleteSuccess.title: Annotation deleted
annotationDeleteSuccess.description: The annotation was removed from this PDF.

annotationDeleteError.title: Failed to delete annotation
annotationDeleteError.description: The annotation could not be removed.

digestSuccess.title: AI digest ready
digestSuccess.description: Generated a structured draft from the current annotations.

digestError.title: Failed to generate AI digest
digestError.description: Could not build an annotation digest for this paper.

digestApplySuccess.title: Digest applied to note
digestApplySuccess.description: The AI digest draft was written into the note.

digestApplyError.title: Failed to apply AI digest
digestApplyError.description: Could not write the AI digest draft into the note.

paperSummaryError.title: Failed to summarize paper
paperSummaryError.description: Could not generate an AI summary for the current paper.

error.title: Export failed
error.description: The export preview could not be generated.

fontScale.label: Interface font size
fontScale.description: Adjust the overall text and component scale across the app

defaultPdfZoom.label: Default PDF Zoom

language.label: Interface Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the interface

autoRenamePdf.description: Automatically rename imported files based on metadata

defaultCitationFormat.label: Default Citation Format
defaultCitationFormat.description: Format used for quick copy operations

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Stored locally and used for paper summary and translation requests

completionUrl.label: Completion URL
completionUrl.description: Use an OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint

model.label: Model
model.description: Model name sent with each request

autoSummarize.label: Auto summarize paper
autoSummarize.description: Generate an AI summary automatically when opening a paper

summaryLanguage.label: Summary language
summaryLanguage.description: Language used for generated paper summaries

summarySystemPrompt.label: Summary system prompt
summarySystemPrompt.description: Controls the instruction template used for paper summary generation and cache invalidation

translateEngine.label: Translation engine
translateEngine.description: Choose Google Translate, Microsoft Bing webpage translation, or your configured LLM

translateLanguage.label: Translation target
translateLanguage.description: Target language for automatic selection translation

translateSystemPrompt.label: Translation system prompt
translateSystemPrompt.description: Only used when the translation engine is set to LLM
translateSystemPrompt.placeholder: You are a precise academic translator...

empty.noMetadataReviewItems: No items in this view need metadata review
empty.hint: Use the Add Library Item button above to add a paper.

metadataHealth.emptyHint: Try another folder, or switch back to all items.

refresh.title: Refresh metadata for items in the current view

tagDialog.title: Edit Item Tags
tagDialog.description: Add custom tags for this PDF item.
tagDialog.help: Press Enter or comma to add a tag.

renameDialog.title: Rename PDF
renameDialog.description: Edit the file name stored in your library.

identifierDialog.title: Import by DOI / arXiv
identifierDialog.description: Create library items from DOI or arXiv identifiers.
identifierDialog.label: Identifiers
identifierDialog.help: Paste one identifier per line, or separate multiple values with commas. Supports DOI URLs, raw DOI values, arXiv URLs, and arXiv IDs.

duplicates.hint: Duplicate groups are inferred from DOI, arXiv ID, and title/author/year matches.

duplicates.title: Duplicates
duplicates.hint: Review inferred duplicates from DOI, arXiv ID, and metadata matches.
duplicates.hintEmpty: Potential duplicates will appear here after import or metadata updates.

dialog.description: Create a saved rule-based view for your library.
dialog.name: Collection name
dialog.ruleRequired: Add at least one rule before saving this smart collection.

preview.title: Live Preview
preview.empty: No papers currently match these rules.

newDialog.description: Create a new folder in your library.

renameDialog.title: Rename Folder
renameDialog.description: Edit the folder name in your library.
renameDialog.name: Folder name

metaPanel.title: Info
metaPanel.empty: Select a paper from the list to view its info

placeholders.tagInput: Type a tag, press Enter or comma

metaPanel.tagsHelp: Press Enter or comma to add · Backspace to remove last

actions.retrieveMetadataDisabled: Metadata refresh requires a PDF attachment

notes.title: Notes

notes.extractTitle: Extract PDF text annotations to note
notes.placeholder: Write your thoughts, summaries, or quotes in Markdown...

metadataFlow.title: Metadata Trace
metadataFlow.empty: No retrieval steps are available yet.
metadataFlow.networkGaps: Some provider requests failed or timed out, so this result may still be incomplete.

aiSummary.title: AI Summary

aiSummary.notConfigured: Configure AI API key, completion URL, and model in Settings to enable automatic paper summaries.

annotations.title: Pdf Annotations
annotations.emptyFiltered: No annotations match the current filters.

summary.title: Paper Summary
summary.empty: No paper summary yet. Click refresh to generate one.
summary.notConfigured: Configure AI API key, completion URL, and model in Settings to enable paper summary.

translation.title: Translation · {language}

translation.notConfigured: Configure the selected translation engine first. Only the LLM option requires AI API settings.
